posture: 35 roles · 11 strong-act · 4 interim/contract worth fast action (Cuscal, Zurich 9-mth, Shippit, Robert Half FP&A 12-mth FTC) plus a fresh afternoon wave incl. CCSG Head of Risk & Compliance — senior-manager risk/governance weighted as core-target matches
summary: Afternoon refresh (Chrome-verified). All morning items re-checked and still live and carried forward; the afternoon feeds added several genuinely new, on-target roles. Best of the new batch: a Head of Risk & Compliance at CCSG Group (Sydney CBD debt-recovery/financial-services group) — a core-target 'Head of' risk/compliance seat — and an FP&A Director on a 12-month fixed-term contract via Robert Half at a funds-management firm reporting to the CFO (a §1a-recruiter contract, so fast-moving). Also new and on-target: a PwC ECDD Senior Manager (Risk & Ethics), an Ethos BeathChapman Audit Manager, a Group Financial Controller via Richard Lloyd, a 6-month finance-manager FTC via TOM, and a Kaizen-held Compliance Committee Member / Responsible Manager. The morning's strong cluster remains live: Revesby Workers' CRO, Zurich Senior Compliance Manager (9-mth contract), Robert Half Senior Manager Risk & Compliance, Ink Recruitment Senior Manager Risk/Compliance/Financial Crime, Cuscal Senior Manager Finance Risk/Controls/Governance (contract), Oxygen Senior Manager Governance & Enablement, Perigon Senior Manager Risk & Resilience, Ethos Senior Risk Manager and the Shippit interim Financial Controller (to ~March 2027). Reader note: interim/contract activity is concentrated in the risk/finance specialists, so the highest-value move remains being registered and CV-current with Bluefin, Kaizen, JS Careers, KPP, Robert Half and Sharp & Carter. Coverage caveat: Seek is sampled via most-recent-first keyword batteries, so older-but-live roles can sit below the fold and a manual look remains worthwhile. Browser-verified this run via Chrome: Seek (risk-manager, compliance, CFO/finance and Board Appointments most-recent feeds plus per-role live checks). I Work for NSW and AICD reviewed via the search fallback this run (AICD teaser-only, member-gated).

items.headline: Non-Executive Directors — Horticulture Innovation Australia (Hort Innovation), Sydney (Hybrid)
items.summary: Board appointments at Hort Innovation, the grower-owned research-and-development corporation that invests on behalf of Australia's ~$18bn horticulture sector, recruited through Rimfire Resources. Part-time NED roles overseeing strategy, governance and a large annual R&D/marketing investment program.
items.so_what: A genuine NED seat suited to your FAICD profile and governance/audit experience; agribusiness is outside your core sectors but the board-level oversight maps well. Apply via Rimfire and reference your StateCover and council board background.

items.headline: Company Secretary — The Skin Hospital, Darlinghurst (Sydney)
items.summary: Board-level company secretary role at The Skin Hospital (a not-for-profit specialist health provider), supporting board governance, statutory and regulatory compliance and company-secretarial administration.
items.so_what: Company-secretarial work is a direct fit for your FAICD/governance background and a foot in the boardroom on the management side. NFP/health sector is adjacent; worth a look if you want a governance seat in a smaller, mission-driven organisation.

items.headline: Independent Chairs & Members, Audit & Risk Committees — NSW Government (Sydney, prequalification panel)
items.summary: Standing NSW Government scheme (ProcurePoint SCM2421) that prequalifies independent chairs and members for the audit and risk committees of NSW departments and statutory bodies, overseeing internal audit, risk management and internal controls.
items.so_what: Direct fit to your FAICD + audit/risk/governance profile and existing committee experience; joining the register positions you for multiple NSW committee appointments. Apply to the panel rather than a single dated vacancy.

items.headline: Compliance Committee Member (ECC) & Responsible Manager — recruiter-held, Sydney (Kaizen Recruitment)
items.summary: Kaizen-held governance appointment combining a seat on an external/enterprise compliance committee with a Responsible Manager designation for a financial-services/funds business. Live on the Seek Board Appointments feed this run.
items.so_what: A committee-level governance role that maps directly to your FAICD, audit/risk committee background and FS affinity — and Kaizen is a §1a risk/compliance specialist, so it is worth a direct call and keeping your CV current with them.

items.headline: Non-Executive Director vacancies across AU sectors — Board Direction listing platform
items.summary: Board Direction maintains Australia's largest public NED list (Commercial, Government and NFP), spanning Banking & Insurance, Energy, Education, Health and Environment across all states. The detailed vacancy listings sit behind a member login; the public page shows the directory and filters only.
items.so_what: Worth a scan for interstate board seats (monthly-travel cadence acceptable per your rule); filter for FS/insurance/energy/government affinity. Browse the live list directly — no single isolated Sydney role surfaced publicly today.

items.headline: Directorship Opportunities — board roles nationally (AICD, member-gated)
items.summary: AICD's Directorship Opportunities platform features 80+ board vacancies and adds roughly 15 new positions a week from thousands of registered organisations. Only public teasers are visible without a member subscription (~$85-88/yr).
items.so_what: As an FAICD this is your richest board pipeline; teasers only here. Worth a manual look in DO this week to filter by sector/location and apply directly — log in on your own account.

items.headline: Chief Risk Officer (CRO) — Revesby Workers' Club, Revesby (Sydney metro)
items.summary: Permanent executive role owning the enterprise risk function at a large registered club/hospitality group in south-west Sydney — building and running the risk, compliance and assurance framework and reporting to the board/CEO. Confirmed live this run.
items.so_what: Bullseye for your CRO target and risk/governance specialisation, and a board-facing C-suite seat in Sydney metro. Strong direct match — apply now and reference your FCPA/FAICD and StateCover/Ku-ring-gai governance experience.

items.headline: Head of Risk & Compliance — Credit Collection Services Group (CCSG), Sydney CBD
items.summary: Permanent 'Head of' role owning the risk and compliance function at CCSG Group, a full-service debt-recovery business spanning contingent collections, legal services, investigations and debt purchase in the Sydney CBD. Browser-verified live this run (posted today).
items.so_what: A core-target 'Head of' risk/compliance seat in a financial-services-adjacent business — a direct match to your risk/compliance specialisation and FCPA. Newly posted, so apply early and reference your CRO/StateCover governance background.

items.headline: Senior Compliance Manager (9-month contract) — Zurich Financial Services Australia, North Sydney (Hybrid)
items.summary: Fixed-term contract senior compliance role at insurer Zurich, leading regulatory compliance activity within the local business on a roughly nine-month engagement. Confirmed live this run (contract/temp work type).
items.so_what: Core-target senior compliance role on a contract basis in your insurance sector strength — interim/contract roles move fast, so apply today. A strong day-rate/fixed-term option that fits your FCPA and risk/compliance depth.

items.headline: Senior Manager — Risk & Compliance (Contract Management) — recruiter-held, Sydney (Robert Half)
items.summary: Recruiter-held permanent senior-manager role (hybrid Sydney) at a fast-scaling, internationally listed infrastructure business spanning data centres, AI and digital assets with a renewable-energy/sustainability backbone, owning risk, compliance and commercial-contract/regulatory obligations. Confirmed live this run.
items.so_what: Senior-manager risk/compliance is core-target for you, and the renewable-energy/infrastructure backdrop plays to your energy/utilities strength. Robert Half is a §1a specialist — call the consultant and submit a current CV today.

items.headline: Senior Manager — Risk, Compliance & Financial Crime — recruiter-held, Sydney CBD (Ink Recruitment)
items.summary: Ink Recruitment exclusive: a hands-on senior-manager role (3-6 month contract with strong likelihood of going permanent, ~$225k package, hybrid Sydney CBD) owning the enterprise risk and compliance framework, leading two direct reports across financial crime and disputes, and acting as the AUSTRAC-registered AML/CTF compliance officer reporting to the CEO. Confirmed live this run.
items.so_what: Direct senior-manager risk/compliance match with board and leadership-team exposure from day one and a clear path to permanent — exactly your level and function. Recruiter-exclusive, so contact Ink early and move fast.

items.headline: Senior Manager, Finance Risk, Controls & Governance (contract) — Cuscal, Sydney (Hybrid)
items.summary: Contract/temp senior-manager role at payments/financial-services group Cuscal, leading the finance risk, controls and governance agenda across the finance function. Confirmed live this run — now showing as a contract engagement.
items.so_what: Core-target Senior Manager role combining finance, risk, controls and governance — a near-exact map to your profile and FCPA, and the contract basis makes it a fast-moving interim option. Strong FS-sector match; apply directly.

items.headline: Senior Manager, Governance and Enablement — recruiter-held, Sydney (Oxygen Recruitment & HR)
items.summary: Recruiter-held permanent senior-manager governance role (hybrid Sydney) covering governance frameworks, enablement and assurance. Confirmed live this run.
items.so_what: Senior-manager governance is core-target for you; recruiter-held roles move fast. Contact the consultant today and reference your FAICD and board/committee experience.

items.headline: Senior Manager — Risk & Resilience — recruiter-held, Sydney (Perigon Group)
items.summary: Recruiter-held permanent senior-manager role (hybrid Sydney) owning enterprise risk and operational/business resilience. Confirmed live this run.
items.so_what: Direct senior-manager risk match with a resilience angle that suits your utilities/insurance background; recruiter-held so act fast. Call Perigon and apply.

items.headline: Senior Risk Manager — recruiter-held, Sydney (Ethos BeathChapman)
items.summary: Recruiter-held senior risk management role (hybrid Sydney) within financial services, leading enterprise/operational risk. Confirmed live this run.
items.so_what: Senior Risk Manager is a core-target, direct match to your risk specialisation and FS affinity; recruiter-held, so make early contact and submit a current CV.

items.headline: ECDD Escalations Outreach Lead / Senior Manager, Risk & Ethics — PwC, Sydney
items.summary: Senior-manager role in PwC's Risk & Ethics function leading enhanced customer due diligence (ECDD) escalations and outreach — a financial-crime/AML-aligned risk role within the firm's internal risk-and-ethics team. Browser-verified live this run (posted today).
items.so_what: Senior Manager is core-target for you and the risk/ethics function fits, but the specialist ECDD/financial-crime escalations focus is a touch narrow against your broader governance remit — hence a judgement call rather than an automatic act.

items.headline: Audit Manager — recruiter-held, Sydney (Ethos BeathChapman)
items.summary: Recruiter-held internal/external audit manager role within financial services via Ethos BeathChapman. Browser-verified live this run (posted today).
items.so_what: Plain Manager level (lower priority, capped at watch) but a clean internal-audit/assurance fit to your FCPA and committee experience; Ethos continues to hold several risk/audit roles, so it is worth keeping your CV current with them.

items.headline: Senior Manager — Regulatory Compliance (APAC) — Crawford & Company, Sydney (Hybrid)
items.summary: Senior-manager role at global claims-management/insurance-services firm Crawford & Company, leading regulatory strategy, governance and risk oversight across Australia and Asia and partnering with senior executives on compliance culture. Confirmed live this run.
items.so_what: Senior-manager regulatory compliance with an insurance-services backdrop fits your sector strength and FCPA; the pan-APAC remit is the only stretch, hence a judgement call. Worth a strong look and an application if the regional scope appeals.

items.headline: Associate Director, Performance Audit — Audit Office of NSW, Sydney
items.summary: Senior role at the Audit Office of NSW leading performance-audit engagements that examine the economy, efficiency and effectiveness of NSW public-sector programs and agencies.
items.so_what: Above-senior-manager assurance role in the public sector with a strong governance/audit fit to your FCPA and committee experience, plus local-government-sector affinity. A judgement call on the specialist performance-audit focus versus your broader remit.

items.headline: Senior Controls Assurance Manager — Teachers Mutual Bank, Sydney
items.summary: Senior-manager role at Teachers Mutual Bank leading controls assurance and testing across the bank's risk and control environment. Still live this run.
items.so_what: Senior-manager assurance role with a strong mutual/FS sector fit to your StateCover/insurance background; slightly niche to controls-testing, so a judgement call against your broader governance focus.

items.headline: Compliance Manager — HCF, Sydney (Hybrid)
items.summary: Compliance Manager at HCF (Australia's largest not-for-profit health fund) supporting APRA and ASIC regulatory obligations, owning the compliance management framework, regulatory affairs, incident management and compliance policies/training. Still live this run.
items.so_what: Plain Manager level (lower priority, capped at watch) but a clean insurance/mutual sector fit to your StateCover/insurance background and FCPA, with strong APRA/ASIC regulatory exposure. Worth a look if you want a compliance seat in a large not-for-profit insurer.

items.headline: Compliance Manager, A&NZ — Chubb Insurance, North Sydney
items.summary: Compliance Manager role covering Australia and New Zealand at global insurer Chubb, supporting the regional compliance framework and regulatory obligations.
items.so_what: Plain Manager level (lower priority, capped at watch) but a direct insurance-sector fit to your background and FCPA. A solid watch if you want a compliance seat in a major global insurer.

items.headline: Risk Manager (Enterprise & P&C Reinsurance) — Munich Re, Sydney
items.summary: Risk manager role at reinsurer Munich Re covering enterprise risk and P&C reinsurance risk in the Sydney office. Still live this run.
items.so_what: Plain Manager level so lower priority, but the reinsurance/insurance sector is a direct fit to your mutual/insurance experience. Worth a look if you want a specialist risk seat in a global insurer.

items.headline: Risk and Compliance Lead — MediRecords, North Sydney
items.summary: Risk and compliance lead role at health-technology/SaaS provider MediRecords, owning the risk and compliance framework for a growing clinical-software business.
items.so_what: Lead-level rather than senior-manager and in a smaller health-tech firm, so peripheral to your seniority — situational awareness only. The risk/compliance function and Sydney location keep it on the radar.

items.headline: Financial Crime Risk Lead — recruiter-held, Sydney (Ethos BeathChapman)
items.summary: Recruiter-held financial-crime risk lead role within financial services, focused on AML/CTF and financial-crime risk frameworks.
items.so_what: Function-adjacent to your risk/compliance background but narrowly specialised in financial crime, so situational awareness rather than a core target. Worth noting Ethos has multiple risk roles live — a reason to keep your CV with them current.

items.headline: Interim Financial Controller (contract to ~March 2027) — Shippit, Darling Point (Sydney)
items.summary: Interim/contract Financial Controller at logistics-tech scale-up Shippit, running the finance/control function on a fixed-term basis through to about March 2027. Confirmed live this run.
items.so_what: Direct interim contract match to your FCPA and financial-control depth; interim roles move fast, so apply today. Good day-rate/fixed-term option while you weigh permanent and board options.

items.headline: FP&A Director (12-month fixed-term contract) — Funds Management firm, recruiter-held, Sydney (Robert Half)
items.summary: Robert Half-held FP&A Director on a 12-month fixed-term contract at a leading funds-management firm, reporting to the CFO and covering strategic financial planning, commercial analysis, fund-performance reporting and finance leadership (hybrid Sydney). Browser-verified live this run.
items.so_what: A director-level, fixed-term finance-leadership role in funds/superannuation (your FS affinity) held by a §1a specialist — contract roles move fast, so call Robert Half and submit a current CV today. Strong fit to your FCPA and finance-leadership depth.

items.headline: Group Financial Controller — recruiter-held, Sydney (Richard Lloyd)
items.summary: Recruiter-held Group Financial Controller role via Richard Lloyd Accounting Recruitment, leading group-level financial control and reporting for a Sydney business. Browser-verified live this run (posted today).
items.so_what: Group-level financial control is at your level and a direct fit to your FCPA and finance-leadership background; sector isn't specified, so confirm fit with the consultant — a solid watch with a quick call to the recruiter.

items.headline: Financial Controller — Multinational Business, recruiter-held, Sydney (Robert Half)
items.summary: Recruiter-held permanent financial controller role at an established global business, overseeing financial control across multiple entities, reporting integrity, compliance and financial governance, and leading a small accounting team. Confirmed live this run.
items.so_what: Multi-entity financial control with a governance and compliance emphasis is a direct fit to your FCPA and finance-leadership depth; Robert Half is a §1a specialist. Industry isn't named, so confirm sector fit with the consultant — worth an early call.

items.headline: General Manager — Finance — Mulpha Australia, Circular Quay (Sydney)
items.summary: Permanent GM-level finance role at diversified real-estate/hospitality investor Mulpha Australia (assets including InterContinental Sydney and Norwest Business Park), leading the finance function on an onsite basis at Circular Quay.
items.so_what: GM Finance is at or above your level and a strong finance-leadership target; property/hospitality is adjacent rather than core, and it is fully onsite, hence a watch. A solid option if you want a senior finance seat in a marquee Sydney group.

items.headline: Head of Controlling — Bosch Rexroth, Kings Park (Sydney metro)
items.summary: Senior 'Head of' finance/controlling role at industrial-technology firm Bosch Rexroth, leading management accounting, controlling and financial performance for the local business. Still live this run.
items.so_what: Head-of-finance level role that fits your FCPA and finance-leadership target; industrial sector is adjacent rather than core, hence a watch. Sydney-metro location works.

items.headline: Finance Manager — 6-month fixed-term contract, Sydney CBD (TOM)
items.summary: Recruiter-held Finance Manager on a 6-month fixed-term contract in the Sydney CBD via TOM. Browser-verified live this run (posted today).
items.so_what: Plain Manager level so peripheral to your seniority, but TOM is a §1a audit/risk/finance specialist and it's a fast-moving contract — situational awareness, and a reason to keep your CV current with TOM.

items.headline: Finance Manager — Infrastructure, Sydney (DMC Recruitment & Search)
items.summary: Recruiter-held finance manager role in the infrastructure sector, covering financial management and reporting for an infrastructure business. Still live this run.
items.so_what: Plain Finance Manager level so peripheral to your seniority, but the infrastructure/utilities adjacency fits your energy/utilities strength. Situational awareness only unless you want a hands-on finance role.

items.headline: General Manager, Business Performance & Operations — recruiter-held, Sydney (Cox Purtell)
items.summary: Recruiter-held GM-level role covering business performance and operations, leading operational delivery, performance management and business-improvement initiatives for a Sydney organisation.
items.so_what: GM-level operations/business-performance role is at your level and maps to your operations/strategy affinity; sector isn't specified, so confirm fit with the recruiter. A solid watch if you want a COO-track operations seat.

items.headline: Data Governance Manager — Harvey Norman, Silverwater (Sydney)
items.summary: Data governance manager role at Harvey Norman, leading data governance frameworks, data quality and stewardship across the retailer. Still live this run.
items.so_what: Plain Manager level and IT/data-governance focused rather than enterprise governance, so peripheral — situational awareness only. Sydney-metro location and a governance-adjacent function keep it on the radar.
